title: HmmmIm going to Germany to be with my childhood lover
display_title: HmmmIm going to Germany to be with my childhood lover
wikitext:
[]: Hmmm...I'm going to Germany to be with my childhood lover?!?             Quote Post by tehprognoob » Sat Oct 16, 2010 3:35 pm At the end of the Asuka ending for Iron Maiden 2, Shinj went to Germany with Asuka by accident... Does he, for some reason, always carry a Japanese passport with an immigration visa authenticated by the German government on me at all times?

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Oct 16, 2010 3:42 pm As an employee of UN agency NERV, he probably has a funky access-all-areas passport.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Oct 16, 2010 5:01 pm The game implies that Shinji and Asuka go to Germany together, yeah. But what's funny is the manga adaption of GoS2 ("Angelic Days") has Shinji brought back to Japan in Volume 6... which works for the manga since it goes beyond the game's story. And Shinji being with Nerv, I'm guessing he would have some sort of passport identification on him.

[]:             Quote Post by InstrumentalityOne » Sun Oct 17, 2010 4:36 am Shinji is actually a pretty famous person, for piloting the Eva and all, I think. (Kaji said that Rei and Shinji were pretty famous in the NGE manga IIRC.) They were probably like: Oh, that´s Shinji, that whiny bitch who saved us all, let´s give him a free ride to Germany, screw the rules.

[]:             Quote Post by tehprognoob » Sun Oct 17, 2010 7:25 am it would've been funny for them to be separated forcibly because of shitty immigraton laws. sombody will be bleeding at the immigration office if they do that.

[]:             Quote Post by closet nerd » Thu Jul 07, 2011 10:38 am deleted k

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Thu Jul 07, 2011 10:46 am closet nerd wrote: I mean the eva is pretty sketchy to begin with but some of these fan fictions are straight up pedaphelia.

[]: :0             Quote Post by closet nerd » Thu Jul 07, 2011 11:05 am deleted in reference to prior deleted post

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Thu Jul 07, 2011 12:19 pm Click on profile ;) Also, it'd pedOphilia.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Thu Jul 07, 2011 12:47 pm closet nerd wrote: Does any one think that some of these fan fictions go way 2 far. I mean the eva is pretty sketchy to begin with but some of these fan fictions are straight up pedaphelia. And as I do recall nothing sexual was to be posted on these forums as part of the terms and conditions....

[]:             Quote Post by closet nerd » Thu Jul 07, 2011 1:13 pm This is eva chit chat and title kinda made it relevant.... seems pretty universal to me, but ok ill delete it.

[]:             Quote Post by Guilt & Innocence » Thu Jul 07, 2011 2:09 pm lol @ wrong topic post OT: Like people are saying, since he is a member of a United Nations Corporation/Branch, he can go anywhere he wants.......due to being a international hero and such

[]:             Quote Post by Viking » Thu Jul 07, 2011 2:55 pm Guilt & Innocence wrote: [..]Like people are saying, since he is a member of a United Nations Corporation/Branch, he can go anywhere he wants.......due to being a international hero and such

[]:             Quote Post by Ironfoot » Thu Jul 07, 2011 4:09 pm Mr. Tines wrote: As an employee of UN agency NERV, he probably has a funky access-all-areas passport.
